stemHtml: Consider a low-wing aeroplane with a low-tailplane entering ground effect during landing. Which of the following is most likely, considering ground effect?

options.a: Nose-down pitching moment and a hard landing.
options.b: Nose-down pitching moment and floating during landing.
options.c: Nose-up pitching moment and a hard landing.
options.d: Nose-up pitching moment and floating during landing.
